current_status_update.text:
Completed a review of v3 diff and existing Nylas features that we have not leveraged

https://developer.nylas.com/docs/v2/upgrade-to-v3/diff-view/#terminology-changes-in-v3

A few interesting new features which would require additional dev:

Email
    New webhook event for emails message.opened could be used to indicate that an internal user had seen a message

Calendars
    Check a calendar for free/busy status
    Each grant can now have up to 10 virtual calendars + Added the option to specify a primary calendar
    ”You can now send drafts” - save?
    You can schedule a send time for a message, and edit or delete scheduled send times. - The new message.send_success and message.send_failed notifications allow you to track the results of a scheduled send
    The new message.bounce_detected notification is available to check for message bounces from Google, Microsoft Graph, iCloud, and Yahoo.
    You can now soft-delete messages and threads

Also discussed Nylas’ scheduling tools which could address some user requests - after chatting with @Jordan Jan and Allie, it seems that this integration would be a heavy lift and wouldn’t qualify for low-hanging fruit
    https://developer.nylas.com/docs/v3/calendar/group-booking/
current_status_update.title: Reviewed v3 diff - no low-hanging fruit, but a few new interesting features to consider
current_status_update.html_text:
Completed a review of v3 diff and existing Nylas features that we have not leveraged https://developer.nylas.com/docs/v2/upgrade-to-v3/diff-view/#terminology-changes-in-v3 A few interesting new features which would require additional dev: Email
  • New webhook event for emails message.opened could be used to indicate that an internal user had seen a message
Calendars
  • Check a calendar for free/busy status
  • Each grant can now have up to 10 virtual calendars + Added the option to specify a primary calendar
  • ”You can now send drafts” - save?
  • You can schedule a send time for a message, and edit or delete scheduled send times. - The new message.send_success and message.send_failed notifications allow you to track the results of a scheduled send
  • The new message.bounce_detected notification is available to check for message bounces from Google, Microsoft Graph, iCloud, and Yahoo.
  • You can now soft-delete messages and threads
Also discussed Nylas’ scheduling tools which could address some user requests - after chatting with @Jordan Jan and Allie, it seems that this integration would be a heavy lift and wouldn’t qualify for low-hanging fruit
  • https://developer.nylas.com/docs/v3/calendar/group-booking/

current_status_update.text:
Summary
We are putting intake to case syncing on hold. After further discovery, we learned that in order for us to make a meaningful impact on where CX would feel comfortable in recommending that more customers use Intake Reports, we needed to include notes syncing at a bare minimum. This cannot be completed within the quarter. We've decided to reallocate that time to further reinforcing our notes auto-save work and will investigate ways in which we might be able to provide more functionality than what we planned to do on that initiative.

We'll reconsider this initiative in context of other 2025 initiatives.
current_status_update.title: Status update - Mar 3
current_status_update.html_text: Summary We are putting intake to case syncing on hold. After further discovery, we learned that in order for us to make a meaningful impact on where CX would feel comfortable in recommending that more customers use Intake Reports, we needed to include notes syncing at a bare minimum. This cannot be completed within the quarter. We've decided to reallocate that time to further reinforcing our notes auto-save work and will investigate ways in which we might be able to provide more functionality than what we planned to do on that initiative. We'll reconsider this initiative in context of other 2025 initiatives.

name: Intake - Transfer more data with "Create case"

current_status_update.text:
> 4-2 release: Rows per page performance issue needs resolution ahead of next GA wave.  Not a release-blocker, but should be addressed ASAP.

Summary

Locked notes are no longer returned to any user without permission in the grid or search
However new reports of lagging experience may require a hotfix or 4-2 release before we want to release to GA
    🗓️ Shifting GA target to 4-2 release, we can move up if hotfixed beforehand
    Note - estimate/actual data quality has been relatively poor for this project, will share with engineers

----------------------------------------

Next steps

    First step in addressing lagging performance has been pushed to QA
    Notes/Service interactions synchronization work continues ahead of Notes v2 release in 4-2 release
    Some outstanding FE cleanup for Locked notes continues

    Admin, Internal, Portal (Access), Workflows for 5-2 release (may be separated further)
